channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead tree at the rear of 37 Houndsden Road N21 1LU, 11th April
item.description:
This tree has been dead for some considerable time and could if it falls cause damage to buildings nearby.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eversley Crescent, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 11th April
item.description:
Dead fox in the street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saratoga Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Engine oil on road and pavement, 11th April
item.description:
Hello Following an RTA a week ago as the vehicles were recovered engine oil was spilt on the road and pavement. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Freezer dumped, 11th April
item.description:
On corner of Greenwich Park St & Park Vista Badly damaged so likely leaking toxic chemicals. It's been there for 4 days Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Vista, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Flytipping, 11th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on the corner of Hackford and Durand Gardens. Reported by the local Liberal Democrat team.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillyard Street, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Broken spider climbing ropes, 11th April

The spider climbing frame in the park is broken

item.title: Someone left trash outside my house, 11th April
item.description:
Someone left a lot of trash outside my house (16 Stannard). This happens a lot. Is it possible to post a sign deterring people from leaving trash? It looks like someone left public city trash bags as well.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stannard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, including metal in the road, 11th April
item.description:
An open back truck hit the speed hump at excessive speed causing waste to fall out into the road. Metal amongst the rubbish!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horncastle Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 11th April
item.description:
No wheel, needs to be removed

item.title: Litter bin, 11th April

Outside Harding News 1 Conington Road Se13 Please empty litter bin

item.title: 50 x 30 x 12, 11th April
item.description:
Issue: Dangerous pothole in carriageway There is a large pothole on Upper Elmers End Road, Beckenham, near No. 88 (please see attached photos for exact location). The pothole is significant in size and depth and presents a danger to cyclists and other road users. It is located in the road where vehicles and bicycles travel. The defect appears to have been previously marked with white paint but has not yet been repaired. Please arrange for this to be inspected and repaired as a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Adams Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
